modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion regarding mixed references in Excel spreadsheets.

full_description_text: 
The user is seeking clarification on the concept of mixed references in Excel. They are encountering difficulties in understanding how these references function within their spreadsheets. This confusion is impacting their ability to effectively utilize Excel for their tasks.
